detail.description: Jimmy Crooks homers (2) on a fly ball to center field.
Jimmy Crooks singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Corbin Carroll. Alec Burleson scores.
Jimmy Crooks doubles (2) on a line drive to center fielder Jackson Merrill. Lars Nootbaar scores. Masyn Winn scores.
Jimmy Crooks doubles (1) on a line drive to right fielder Brandon Nimmo.
Jimmy Crooks singles on a fly ball to right fielder Brandon Nimmo. Bryan Torres scores. Masyn Winn to 3rd.
Jimmy Crooks singles on a line drive to left fielder Alejandro Osuna. Bryan Torres to 3rd.
Jimmy Crooks homers (3) on a fly ball to right center field.
Jimmy Crooks singles on a line drive to center fielder Tim Tawa.
Jimmy Crooks homers (1) on a fly ball to right field. Masyn Winn scores.
Jimmy Crooks singles on a line drive to right fielder Lane Thomas.
Jimmy Crooks singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Byron Buxton.
Jimmy Crooks singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Mike Yastrzemski.
